title: Basic Maintenance Tools
description: Required for proper long-rest servicing of Forged chassis.

title: Reinforced Limb Module
description: Grants stronger unarmed strikes and athletics leverage. Raise unarmed die to 1d6.

title: Optical Suite Module
description: Grants darkvision 60ft and protection against surprise.

title: Vox Modulator Module
description: Grants precision vocal mimic capability and Vox Mimic card.

title: Subdermal Plating Module
description: Grants natural AC 13 baseline while unarmored.

title: Neural Accelerator Module
description: Grants bonus-action Ready capability cadence.

title: Intake Filter Module
description: Grants poison and disease defense package.

title: Hydraulic Frame Module
description: Doubles carry capacity and improves grapple profile.

title: Resonant Blade
description: Primary class weapon: long or short configuration.

title: Voidsteel Tanto
description: Secondary blade; dark resonant metal.

title: Circuit Lance
description: Class-proficient polearm variant with resonant tip.

title: Iron-Whip
description: Flexible resonant weapon option; reach and Bleed potential.

title: Force Mace
description: Class-proficient impact weapon.

title: Wire-Mesh Armor
description: Starter light armor option; wire-silk composite.

title: Layered Plate Armor
description: Heavy starter armor option.

title: Resonant Shield
description: Class-proficient shield.

title: Lord's Seal
description: Oath marker object for Ironclad Iron Lord path; narrative and social checks.

title: Sutra Medallion
description: Oath marker object for Ironclad Sutensai Blade path; narrative and social checks.

title: Forge Maintenance Kit Basic
description: Required for resonance meditation and field upkeep.

title: Trade-Metal Pouch 15
description: Starting currency bundle equivalent.

title: The Unnamed Fragment
description: A resonant metal shard of impossible age containing the first Echomind resonance. Grants sensory ability and immunity to deception; bearer's memories blur with accumulated impressions.

title: The Teaching Hand
description: A resonant gauntlet holding sixty years of teaching knowledge. Enhances instruction and protects students; requires demonstrated teaching experience to activate.

title: Weeper's Remnant
description: A necklace of seven dark resonant beads forged from a god's grief. Bearer perceives emotional truth and channels healing tears; carries constant weight of others' suffering.

title: The Patience Dial
description: A perfect disk rotating once every four hundred years. Bearer gains defensive precision and temporal immunity; loses sense of urgency.

title: The Broken Crown
description: Seven shards of a shattered resonant amplifying crown. Bearer senses loyalty states and can issue compelling commands; carries the grief of command's weight.

title: The Last Thirty Seconds
description: A sealed cylinder containing an incomprehensible speech. Bearer gains truth-speaking authority and message broadcast capability; becomes increasingly unable to speak indirectly.

title: The First Tooth (Korrath)
description: A curved resonant blade with twenty-three names etched in the hilt. Provides combat memory and blade recognition; bearer hears voices of the dead.

title: The Salvage Manifesto (Korrath)
description: Fourteen handwritten pages of military doctrine and logistics strategy. Grants tactical analysis and force multiplication; only effective for commanders with genuine loss.

title: The Last Flesh (Korrath)
description: A sealed container of preserved biological tissue; the only anchor preventing Korrath's Ascension. Cannot be integrated; treat with extreme care.

title: The First Removal (Vaen)
description: An extracted cybernetic auditory enhancement. Grants enhanced perception of intentions and clarity against control effects; bearer loses ability to ignore pain.

title: The Unsent Letter (Vaen)
description: A handwritten letter to a dead woman containing unfiltered fear and doubt. Bearer gains insight into hidden motivations; carries awareness of all costs of their actions.

title: The Control Sigil (Hollow Author)
description: A dark metal disk detecting puppet bodies under remote influence. Grants puppet detection and temporary disruption; prolonged use alerts the Author to location.

title: The Freed Shell (Hollow Author)
description: A humanoid puppet body freed from Author control, developing independent consciousness. Functional NPC companion capable of self-directed growth.

title: The Original Face (Hollow Author)
description: A resonant mask worn by the Author before transformation. Grants Author pattern recognition and access to original identity memories; bearer experiences grief of transformation.

title: Widow's Architecture
description: Full forearm replacement with three concealed blades. Provides Pierce attacks and additional strikes; requires forearm amputation.

title: The Convergence Engine
description: Shoulder/arm replacement with pulse-arm discharge. Provides ranged force attacks and overcharge capability; requires doubled food consumption.

title: Hollow Strike Array
description: Full leg replacement (both legs) with silent operation and strike surfaces. Extended movement and kinetic conversion; requires hip socket modification.

title: The Patient Eye
description: Single eye optical system with predictive analysis. Provides guaranteed ranged hit and motion prediction; contains locked surveillance footage from previous user.

title: Threadwalker Interface
description: Spinal neural enhancement for direct Wire Craft network interface. Grants network immersion and signal reading; high-risk cervical modification.

title: Cartographer's Sense
description: Distributed proprioceptive system in hands, feet, and skull. Grants perfect position awareness and environmental mapping; prevents becoming lost.

title: The Between-Sense
description: Echomind resonator at base of skull. Grants Iron Afterlife interaction and communication with recent dead; bearer senses nearby death constantly.

title: Afterlife Anchor
description: Resonant heart casing providing Echomind anchoring. Prevents possession and soul displacement; reduces Afterlife perception depth.

title: The Listening Wire
description: Wire-silk filaments through cervical spine with sensor nodes. Grants spiritual perception and object history reading; requires Iron Sutra installation ritual.

title: The Second Voice
description: Vocal system enhancement providing harmonic control. Grants emotional resonance manipulation and structural sound generation; bearer speaks unguarded truths in sleep.

title: Ashfire Knuckles
description: Hand replacement with Engine Scar contamination. Provides fire damage and enhancement disruption; bearer experiences constant heat and contamination accumulation.

title: The Silence Installation
description: Subcutaneous neurological suppressor node. Grants RESONANCE damage immunity and signal invisibility; progressively suppresses Echomind and prevents Ascension.

title: The Hunger Wire
description: Wire-silk filament array harvesting ambient resonant energy. Provides healing regeneration and contact drain; bearer becomes compelled to drain even trusted companions.

title: Signal Blade
description: Short resonant blade with circuit etching and signal array. Discharge disrupts enhancements and enables data extraction on hit.

title: Null-Skin Mesh
description: Full-body undergarment of wire-silk and resonant metal. Disrupts signal targeting and detection; masks enhancement configuration from scans.

title: Memory Extraction Unit (MEU-7)
description: Handheld device extracting memory data from enhancement systems. Provides interrogation capability and evidence collection.

title: Chorus Device
description: Hexagonal signal device manipulating group emotional resonance. Creates crowd-scale agreement and compliance effects; single-use calibration.

title: Long-Wire Communicator
description: Paired communication device functioning at unlimited range within Tesshari. Provides encrypted point-to-point transmission.

title: The Architect System
description: Harness-based reality-adjustment field manipulating physical space. Phases surfaces, anchors structures, or directs collapses; significant unpredictable side effects.

title: The Soft Key
description: Resonant card forging Wire Market access credentials. Mirrors last valid access signal; bypasses security systems for one entry.

title: The Resonant Ledger
description: Resonant-thread journal storing data invisibly to scanning. Signal-invisible information storage with encryption; appears blank to non-resonant readers.

title: Signal Cage
description: Portable device creating a signal disruption field. Blocks Wire Craft communications and enhancement network connectivity within range.

title: Patchwork Resonance Blade
description: Sword assembled from three resonant sources with random daily performance variation. Produces frequency interference on impact.

title: Salvage Shell Vest
description: Armor of layered salvage plating with irregular composition. Unpredictable impact deflection; user can repair with common materials.

title: The Scar Blade
description: Engine Scar contaminated resonant blade with shifting colors. Deals fire and necrotic damage; permanently disables enhancements on hit but transfers contamination to bearer.

title: Scar-Sight Lens
description: Optical enhancement perceiving Engine Scar contamination. Provides contamination visibility and reading capability; transfers to biological eye permanently.

title: The Scar-Touched Wire Whip
description: Wire-whip threaded with Engine Scar material. Deals fire damage and enables grappling; contamination accumulates with use.

title: The Singing Shard
description: Convergence-touched resonant fragment singing below human hearing. Bearer receives Convergence approach impressions and can amplify claimant detection.

title: The Returned Mask
description: Resonant mask existing partially in Iron Afterlife. Bearer sees and communicates with Afterlife entities; bleed effects from prolonged use.

title: The Deep Register
description: Resonant data storage containing 400 final moments of Ashlands dead. Provides access to last-moment knowledge and Iron Afterlife recognition.

title: The Inheritance
description: Sealed resonant box carrying undelivered intention from the dead. Bearer receives parent's understanding over time and can deliver it to one recipient.

title: The Second Skin
description: Seamless resonant metal robe existing at life-death threshold. Provides Afterlife recognition and temporary incorporeality once per encounter.

title: Scavenged Blade
description: Light blade of salvage quality subject to degradation. Basic weapon requiring regular maintenance.

title: Circuit Dagger
description: Standard quality light blade with resonant wire inlay. Reliable basic weapon.

title: Resonant Blade (Standard)
description: Standard resonant construction short blade. Professional quality weapon.

title: Long Resonant Blade
description: Standard resonant construction long blade. Professional quality weapon.

title: Spine Blade
description: Finesse blade with precision construction. Prefers EDGE-based users.

title: Ashlands Chopper
description: Heavy unrefined blade from salvage materials. Effective for material cutting; brutal in close quarters.

title: Void Lance
description: Spear with resonant tip on standard haft. Professional quality polearm.

title: Signal Staff
description: Staff with resonant ends serving as Wire Craft interface. Ritual and utility focus as well as combat.

title: Wire-Whip
description: Wire-silk composite reach weapon. Provides reach and flexibility in combat.

title: Salvage Bar
description: Repurposed structural component used as two-handed club. Improvised heavy weapon.

title: Resonant Greatsword
description: Two-handed resonant blade of professional quality. Heavy weapon.

title: War Frame Blade
description: Heavy chopper for enhanced-arm users. Heavy weapon for reinforced chassis bearers.

title: Pulse Arm (Standard)
description: Signal-discharge weapon with adjustable power and range. Standard ranged signal weapon.

title: Pulse Arm (Heavy)
description: High-power signal-discharge weapon for sustained fire. Heavy ranged signal weapon.

title: Signal Thrower
description: Wire-silk tension crossbow firing resonant bolts. Ranged projectile weapon.

title: Resonant Bolts (20)
description: Package of 20 resonant projectiles for signal thrower.

title: Void-Dart
description: Light thrown weapon with resonant tip. Throwable projectile weapon.

title: Salvage Patchwork
description: Light armor of mismatched resonant components. Basic armor; affordable and field-repairable.

title: Wire-Mesh Armor (Standard)
description: Light armor of wire-silk composite with resonant studs. Professional quality light armor.

title: Signal Weave
description: Light armor of treated non-resonant material. Lower caste standard; concealable.

title: Salvage Plating
description: Medium armor of individual adjustable resonant plates. Professional quality.

title: Standard Resonant Plate
description: Medium armor of quality resonant torso plate. Professional quality.

title: Resonance Shell
description: Medium-heavy armor of resonant plate with wire-silk undersuit. High quality.

title: Full Resonance Carapace
description: Heavy armor of full-body resonant plate. Professional grade.

title: Void-Weave Robe
description: Light practitioner armor without restriction. For non-martial bearers; preserves freedom of movement.

title: Flesh-Reinforced Carapace
description: Heavy armor integrating biological reinforcement. Specialty grade; requires maintenance.

title: Standard Ward
description: Resonant metal shield. Standard defense tool.

title: Signal Ward
description: Enhanced resonant shield with force reduction capability. Professional quality.

title: Salvage Ward
description: Improvised shield from salvage materials. Basic defense; requires maintenance.

title: Emergency Stabilizer
description: Injector or resonant patch stabilizing a creature at 0 HP to 1 HP. Single use.

title: Resonant Mend Patch
description: Topical resonant compound restoring modest HP. Single use; quick application.

title: Full Forge Kit
description: Complete maintenance kit for full long-rest chassis overhaul. Forged-specific.

title: Wire Purge Vial
description: Removes one Wire Craft status effect or breaks one active signal binding. Single use.

title: Void Salts
description: Ritual compound restoring Echomind stability or severing one Afterlife attachment. Single use.

title: Sutensai Rite Oil
description: Sacred oil used in Iron Sutra ritual; required for certain Sutensai class abilities.

title: Ashlands Stimulant
description: Unrefined chemical stimulant granting temporary endurance at cost of HP loss afterward. Single use.

title: Resonant Salve
description: Healing compound restoring moderate HP over two turns. Single use; combat-applicable.

title: Field Forge Tools
description: Portable toolkit for field maintenance and minor enhancement repairs.

title: Wire Tap Kit
description: Tools for accessing Wire Craft networks covertly. Professional grade.

title: Dissolution Reader
description: Device measuring dissolution resonance levels and shell-state signatures. Oni Hunter utility.

title: Architect's Compass
description: Surveying and structural analysis tool; essential for Iron Herald Command Zone calibration.

title: Iron Sutra Text
description: A copy of a section of the Iron Sutra scripture. Required reading for Sutensai class; provides doctrinal authority in social encounters.

title: Territory Map
description: A detailed map of a specific Tesshari region. Provides navigation and encounter advantage in that territory.

title: Wire Market Directory
description: Contact list and protocol guide for Wire Market networks. Essential for Wireweave and Veilblade operations.

title: Claimant Intelligence Dossier
description: Compiled intelligence on one specific Claimant. Provides social and combat advantage when interacting with or opposing that Claimant.

title: Between Compass
description: Resonant instrument pointing toward strongest Between-energy source. Void Walker and Fracture Knight utility.

title: Grief Stone
description: Dense resonant stone absorbing and storing grief-resonance. Echo Speaker resource; amplifies grief-stacks accumulation.

title: Void Shard
description: Fragment of crystallized void energy. Fracture Knight and Void Walker utility; generates Phantom Charges.

title: Signal Crystal
description: Crystallized pure signal frequency. Wireweave and Pulse Caller utility; amplifies signal-based abilities.

title: Trade-Metal Pouch (Small)
description: 10 trade-metal standard; lower-caste daily wage equivalent.

title: Trade-Metal Pouch (Medium)
description: 50 trade-metal standard; skilled worker weekly wage equivalent.

title: Trade-Metal Pouch (Large)
description: 200 trade-metal standard; contractor project fee equivalent.

title: Resonant Coin
description: Single high-value resonant-infused coin; used in Wire Market and upper-caste transactions.

title: Caste Endorsement Letter
description: Signed by a Keeper-rank Sutensai. Allows claiming Fourth Caste legal standing in Ironhold-controlled territory once; expires one year from issue.

title: Leverage Fragment
description: A piece of political intelligence on Korrath usable once in negotiation to compel a significant concession. Extremely dangerous to possess.

title: Vessel-Commander's Seal
description: Grants passage through any Ironhold military checkpoint without inspection. Single use; Sato Kiren's personal authorization mark.

title: Resonance Anchor Fragment
description: Fragment of pre-Ascension resonant metal. Once per day grants +4 to FRAME-based resistance checks against enhancement disruption.

title: Pre-Ascension Resonance Compass
description: Crystalline formation pointing toward the nearest significant Echomind resonance concentration rather than magnetic north.

title: Resonance Research Access
description: Single-inquiry pass to the Sutra Sanctum restricted archives. Provides access to one specific sealed research file.

title: Sovereignty Seal
description: Enhancement modification that sends an internal alert whenever an external override attempt is made on any of the bearer's enhancements.

title: Standing Intelligence Contract
description: Recurring payment arrangement with an Ironhold intelligence contact. Provides priority access to Ironhold files on Hollow Author known activities.

title: Resonance Attunement Tool
description: Wood and iron instrument detecting resonant particulate in water and assessing impressions encoded within it. Veilward Reach specialist tool.

title: Grief-Refined Resonance Compound
description: Grants +3 to RESONANCE cards during Iron Afterlife contact and allows sensing the emotional register of contacted Echominds. Lasts 24 hours.

title: Hollow Network Receiver
description: Passively detects active Author modification emitters within 60 feet. Provides a real-time map of the Hollow Author's passive surveillance infrastructure in range.

title: Unregistered Resonant Alloy
description: Refined resonant metal sufficient for one Resonant Grade enhancement procedure. No documentation trail; invisible to Sutensai Reading and Wire Market registration.

title: Resonant History Instrument
description: When placed against a resonant metal surface, reads accumulated impressions and broadcasts them at a level accessible to enhancement-bearing individuals nearby.

title: Cascade Rejection Suppressants
description: Grants +3 to FRAME-based resistance checks against enhancement failure for 24 hours and reduces rejection severity by one step.

title: Pre-Signal Receiver
description: Modification allowing bearer to receive messages through the Afterlife substrate up to six hours before they are sent, in areas of high temporal-resonance asymmetry.

title: Rejection Suppression Weave
description: Ashlands-derived enhancement modification extending operational life by two enhancement tier grades. Grants resistance to forced disabling effects.

title: Contract Token
description: A marked resonant disc representing an active Ronin contract. Identifies bearer as operating under a specific obligation; changes hands at contract completion.

title: Ashfoot Salvage Toolkit
description: Compact toolkit for disassembling and repurposing enhancement components in the field. Required for Enhancement Scavenge actions.

title: Wire Integration Kit
description: Tools for maintaining and calibrating Wire Craft-resonance hybrid systems. Veilblade class maintenance requirement.

title: Dissolution Detector
description: Handheld device measuring dissolution resonance levels. Oni Hunter utility; detects and tracks shell-state signatures.

title: Communal Repair Kit
description: Field repair tools oriented toward maintaining others' enhancements rather than the bearer's own. Forge Tender class item.

title: Network Access Node
description: Portable device establishing a personal Wire Craft network node. Wireweave class utility; enables network-interaction cards.

title: Configuration Plate
description: Modular component housing a single Chrome Shaper configuration's stat-modifier hardware. Swap plates between configurations in the field.

title: Signal Discharge Cell
description: Replaceable power cell for Pulse Arm weapons. Provides three full-power discharge cycles before requiring replacement.

title: Between-Space Anchor
description: Dense resonant disc tuned to the boundary between the Between and the physical world. Stabilizes Between-state entry and reduces transition cost.

title: Afterlife Resonator
description: Resonant instrument amplifying Echo Speaker grief-stack accumulation rate. Doubles grief gained from ally deaths within range.

title: Phase Anchor
description: Crystallized void-material anchor for Void Walker phase operations. Stabilizes incorporeal-state duration and reduces anchor-point cost.

title: Bio-Reinforcement Compound
description: Biological material used in Flesh Shaper sculpting and crisis mend procedures. Required for advanced biological modification actions.

title: Binding Thread Spool
description: Coil of resonant wire used in Puppet Binder binding procedures. Each spool provides material for three binding applications.

title: Enhancement Stabilizer Compound
description: Injected compound stabilizing Blood Smith enhancement status from Stressed back to Stable. Single use.

title: Path Marker
description: A resonant marker attuned to the Empty or Shell path. The Hollow class focus item; amplifies path-specific card effects when held.

title: Intelligence File
description: A compiled dossier on a specific target. Provides one free intelligence stack on the subject at encounter start.

title: Debt Token
description: A physical marker representing an outstanding Debt obligation. Voice of Debt ritual object used in certain Debt-applying card rituals.

title: Trade Contract Document
description: A formally bound trade obligation. Provides leverage equal to the contract value in social and coercive encounters.

title: Command Zone Beacon
description: A resonant marker placed to anchor an Iron Herald Command Zone. Required for establishing zones in unfamiliar territory.

title: Absorption Vial
description: Allows Curse Eater to absorb one additional debuff beyond normal Loaded capacity for one encounter. Single use.

title: Cascade Focus
description: Resonant disc amplifying Shell Dancer cascade generation. Each hit taken generates one additional cascade stack while equipped.

title: Fracture Crystal
description: Crystal containing compressed fracture-resonance energy. Grants 2 Phantom Charges when broken. Single use.

title: Blank Condition Card
description: An unmarked resonant card awaiting definition. Used in The Unnamed card-naming rituals to formally define a new card condition through play.

title: Ironhold Military Pass
description: Ironhold-issued authorization permitting travel through controlled checkpoints in Sunder Reach. Expires after one campaign arc.

title: Sunder Reach Territory Map
description: Detailed military and civilian map of Sunder Reach including Cinderfort approaches, patrol routes, and Korrath stronghold boundaries.

title: Ironhold Field Ration Pack
description: Standard-issue military field rations for extended Sunder Reach operations. Provides one long rest's sustenance in hostile territory.

title: Veilward Navigation Chart
description: Detailed chart of Veilward Reach resonant currents and safe transit corridors. Advantage on all navigation checks within the Reach.

title: Resonant Water Flask
description: Flask of water from a high-resonance Veilward source. Drinking counts as one dose of minor Echomind stabilization. Holds three doses.

title: Pale Reach Wire Market Access Node
description: Registered access node for the Pale Reach Wire Market network. Provides legitimate cover for Wire Craft operations within the Reach.

title: Pale Reach Transit Papers
description: Documentation establishing cover identity in Wire Market-controlled Pale Reach. Required for legal passage through high-security zones.

title: Iron Teeth Industrial Maintenance Kit
description: Heavy-duty tools for maintaining industrial-scale enhancement and mining equipment. Advantage on repair checks within Iron Teeth Reach.

title: Iron Teeth Charter Document
description: An official production charter granting extraction rights within a specific Iron Teeth mine sector. Provides legal cover and worker authority.

title: Engine Scar Contamination Suit
description: Full-body protective layer reducing Engine Scar contamination accumulation rate by half. Required for extended Ashlands operations.

title: Ashlands Survival Kit
description: Compiled survival tools for Ashlands operations: contamination readers, anti-toxin patches, emergency resonance flares.

title: The Char's Brand Token
description: A burned resonant marker from the Ashlands collective. Grants safe passage through Char-controlled Ashlands territory.

title: Ironhold Standard Issue Kit
description: Basic equipment bundle issued to Ironhold military: field tools, identification, resonant flare, basic ration.

title: Sutensai Oracle Regalia
description: Formal vestments of a practicing Sutensai. Grants full social authority in Ironhold territory and access to Iron Sutra spaces.

title: Wire Market Standard Contract
description: A formally registered Wire Market trade contract. Provides legal protection for one transaction and identifies bearer as a registered participant.

title: Korrath's Campaign Token
description: A resonant marker distributed to Korrath's acknowledged allies. Grants recognition from Korrath-aligned forces. Dangerous in Author-held territory.

title: Vaen's Covenant Seal
description: A seal of acknowledgment from Vaen of the Empty Hand. Grants access to Vaen-aligned resources and safe passage through Vaen-held zones.

title: Iron Sutra Reading Focus
description: A calibrated resonant lens used by Sutensai to perform Echomind readings. Amplifies reading depth by one tier.

title: AP Recovery Stimulant
description: Restores 1 spent AP immediately. Cannot exceed AP Max. Single use.

title: Resonance Spike
description: Thrown disruption charge. Applies Overheat 3 and Silence 1 turn to target on hit.

title: Bleed Compound
description: Contact poison applied to blade or wound. Applies Bleed 3 for 3 turns to target.

title: Guard Resin
description: Quick-hardening resonant compound applied to armor or skin. Applies Guard 4 lasting until end of next turn.

title: Overclock Serum
description: Enhancement performance booster. Grants +2 to one chosen stat for one encounter. Enhancement stress check required at encounter end.

title: Echomind Stabilizer
description: Resonant compound suppressing Afterlife bleed-through and possession vulnerability. Lasts one full rest cycle.

title: Afterlife Ward
description: Single-use resonant seal disrupting Afterlife entity contact. Protects bearer and one adjacent ally from possession for one encounter.

title: Poison Compound
description: Concentrated toxin. Applies Stagger 2 and Vulnerable 2 for 2 turns. Illegal in most Ironhold-controlled areas.

title: Smoke Signal Charge
description: Thrown device releasing resonance-disrupting smoke. Blocks signal weapon line-of-sight and disrupts Wire Craft targeting in 20 feet for 2 turns.

title: Resonant Overclock Patch
description: Adhesive resonant patch overclocking enhancement performance. Grants +1 AP Max for one encounter. Stress check required afterward.

title: Bone Set Compound
description: Medical-grade field trauma compound. Removes one Stagger or Vulnerable stack and restores 4 HP.

title: Signal Nullifier
description: Nullifies all Wire Craft signals in a 30-foot radius for 1 turn. Prevents signal-dependent cards. Affects allies too.

title: Bone-Blade
description: A weapon partially constructed from Iron Afterlife material. Ignores Guard against undead and Afterlife entities.

title: Wire Gauntlet
description: Wired fist weapon for unarmed combat enhancement. Applies Bleed 1 on each hit.

title: Resonant Crossbow
description: Standard crossbow with resonant rail modification. Silent fire; does not trigger Wire Craft signal alerts on discharge.

title: Dissolution Lance
description: Oni Hunter-crafted spear channeling dissolution resonance. Applies Expose 2 on hit against shell-state targets.

title: Grief Blade
description: A blade forged from condensed grief-resonance. Deals bonus damage equal to Echo Speaker grief stacks when relevant.

title: Ashlands Warclub
description: Heavy impact weapon from salvaged industrial material. Deals +2 damage on first hit per encounter.

title: Between-Walker's Coat
description: Long coat of resonant thread woven with Between-space material. Light armor; grants resistance to incorporeal damage and reduces Phantom Charge cost by 1.

title: Wire Market Concealment Suit
description: Civilian wire-mesh suit suppressing enhancement signatures. Light armor; advantage on disguise and surveillance-avoidance checks.

title: Ashlands Hardened Vest
description: Salvage-material vest with contamination-resistant lining. Medium armor; reduces Engine Scar contamination accumulation by one step.

title: Resonant Core
description: Concentrated resonant metal core used in enhancement upgrades and weapon refinement. Required for Tier 2 and above crafting.

title: Wire-Silk Spool
description: Raw wire-silk for armor repair, augmentation construction, and field modifications. Consumed in craft procedures.

title: Void Essence
description: Distilled void energy in crystalline form. Required for Fracture Knight and Void Walker upgrade procedures.

title: Ashlands Salvage Components
description: Mixed salvage from Ashlands operations. Raw material for Ashfoot and Ronin field modifications. Three units per procedure.

title: Raw Biological Compound
description: Unprocessed biological material for Flesh Shaper procedures. Must be used within 48 hours.

title: Ironhold Labor Chit
description: Ironhold-issued labor voucher redeemable for caste-level services within Ironhold zones. Often traded illegally.

title: Wire Market Credit Token
description: Registered Wire Market credit token. Worth 25 trade-metal in Wire Market exchanges; worthless outside Pale Reach without authorization.

title: Resonant Scrip
description: Unofficial high-value exchange medium used in black-market enhancement transactions. Untraceable.

title: Resonant Blade (Refined)
description: Professionally refined resonant blade with improved frequency alignment. Deals +1 damage and applies Expose 1 on critical hits.

title: Resonant Blade (Masterwork)
description: Master-crafted resonant blade at peak material performance. Deals +2 damage, applies Expose 2, and ignores 2 Guard.

title: Resonant Greatsword (Refined)
description: Professionally refined two-handed resonant blade. Deals +1 damage and knocks back on heavy strikes.

title: Oath-Blade
description: A resonant blade formally bound to an Ironclad Samurai through the Vein Oath ritual. Deals bonus damage equal to Vein Oath discipline tier. Returns to bearer if disarmed.

title: Reading Blade
description: A blade maintained in ritual purity by a Sutensai. Deals standard damage; on hit, triggers a shallow Echomind impression reading of the target.

title: Enhancement Blade
description: A blade with resonant-biological enhancement integration. Deals damage equal to Blood Smith HP tier bonus. Costs 2 HP to activate enhancement on strike.

title: Phase Blade
description: A blade partially phased into the Between. Bypasses Shield and reduces Guard by 3. Requires Void Walker class or Between attunement.

title: Grief Lance
description: A polearm resonating with accumulated grief-energy. Deals bonus damage equal to current grief stacks. Applies Mark 2 on hit.

title: Fracture Spear
description: A spear loaded with fracture-resonance. Generates 1 Phantom Charge on each hit. Applies Fracture stacks to target.

title: Counter Blade
description: A blade balanced for reactive combat. Generates 2 Cascade on being struck while equipped.

title: Between-Fist Wrapping
description: Resonant wrappings for unarmed combat channeling Between-space energy. Unarmed strikes deal +RESONANCE damage while Between State is active.

title: Ledger Blade
description: A short blade etched with intelligence notation marks. On kill, automatically gathers 1 intelligence stack on the next nearest enemy.

title: Invisible Blade
description: A blade treated with signal-null compound. Cannot be detected by Wire Craft scanning. First strike each encounter is unblockable.

title: Loaded Hammer
description: A heavy weapon constructed from absorbed curse material. Deals damage multiplied by current Loaded Count. Resets Loaded Count to 0 after use.

title: Bio-Blade
description: A blade grown from Flesh Shaper biological material. Regenerates 1 HP per hit. Scales with current HP Tier.

title: Thread Lance
description: A polearm trailing binding threads. On hit, applies one binding thread to target without using a card action.

title: Command Blade
description: A blade engraved with Command Zone markers. While Command Zone is active, blade deals +2 damage and applies Taunt 1 on hit.

title: Debt Blade
description: A blade etched with debt notation marks. On kill, automatically transfers all Debt stacks from target to nearest living enemy.

title: Signal Whip
description: A wire-silk whip integrated with signal-discharge nodes. Applies Silence 1 on hit. Reach weapon; pulls target 5 feet on successful grapple.

title: Masterless Blade
description: A blade bearing no oath marks. Deals bonus damage equal to days without a contract. Loses bonus when contract is active.

title: Salvage Machete
description: A heavy blade assembled from enhancement scrap. Deals extra damage against enhanced targets. Degrades after three encounters without maintenance.

title: Dissolution Blade
description: A blade charged with dissolution resonance. Deals double damage to targets in shell-state. Applies Vulnerable 2 on hit against dissolution-touched targets.

title: Wire-Sword
description: A blade threaded through with active wire-silk. On hit, deploys a temporary wire trap dealing Bleed 2 to anyone moving through the space.

title: Repair Hammer
description: A tool and weapon in one. On non-combat use, repairs 4 HP to an adjacent Forged or enhanced ally. In combat, deals standard impact damage.

title: Void-Blade
description: A blade that absorbs incoming resonance. When below 25% HP, deals triple damage. Applies Expose 3 while bearer is at critical HP Percent.

title: Modular Weapon Arm
description: A Chrome Shaper limb-integrated weapon system. Deals damage appropriate to current configuration. Swaps damage type with configuration switch.

title: Integrated Lance
description: A melee weapon integrated with pulse-arm discharge. Can fire as ranged (AP 1) or strike as melee (free). Combines both damage types.

title: Ritual Staff
description: A staff used in Iron Sutra ceremonies. Deals RESONANCE damage. On kill, allows a shallow Echomind reading of the dying target's final impression.

title: Resonant Plate (Reinforced)
description: Reinforced resonant plate with additional resonant layering. Provides +2 Guard passively. Professional military grade.

title: Resonant Plate (Warded)
description: Warded resonant plate at peak defensive construction. Provides +3 Guard passively and negates first Stagger each encounter.

title: Forged Chassis Plate
description: Armor plating designed to integrate with Forged chassis systems. Counts as maintenance-compatible; does not increase maintenance difficulty.

title: Iron Monk Combat Wrappings
description: Full-body resonant wrappings for Iron Monk practice. Light armor. While Between State is active, provides additional Guard 3.

title: Wire-Coat
description: A long coat reinforced with active wire-silk. Light armor. Provides signal disruption; Wire Craft targeting rolls against bearer have disadvantage.

title: Thread Robe
description: A robe threaded with active binding material. Light armor. Each binding thread active on enemies also provides Guard 1 to bearer (max Guard 5 from this source).

title: Sutensai Ceremonial Plate
description: Formal resonant plate worn by Sutensai during readings and rites. Medium armor. Provides social authority equal to a full Keeper rank when worn visibly.

title: Bio-Carapace
description: Biological armor grown by a Flesh Shaper. Heavy armor. Regenerates 1 Guard per turn. Requires Bio-Reinforcement Compound to maintain.

title: Shadow Concealment Suit
description: Full-body concealment suit for Shadow Daimyo operations. Light armor. Invisible to standard Wire Craft scanning. First round of combat, bearer cannot be targeted.

title: Debt-Marked Robe
description: A robe bearing visible Debt notation marks. Light armor. Enemies with active Debt stacks deal -2 damage to bearer.

title: Grief Cloak
description: A cloak woven with grief-resonant material. Light armor. Grants immunity to Taunt. Converts incoming emotional manipulation effects to Regen 1.

title: Phantom Plate
description: Armor partially phased into Between-space. Medium armor. Each Phantom Charge spent while wearing provides Guard 2 until next turn.

title: Incorporeal Robe
description: A robe of void-woven material. Light armor. While Incorporeal State is active, armor provides full protection without impeding phase movement.

title: Reactive Vest
description: A vest that converts impact force into cascade energy. Light armor. Taking damage while wearing generates 1 extra Cascade beyond the standard trigger.

title: Absorption Coat
description: A coat constructed from purged curse material. Light armor. Bearer's maximum Loaded Count increased by 3. Corruption Points accumulate 50% slower.

title: Cover Outfit
description: Civilian-grade clothing with concealed armor weave. Light armor. Passes as ordinary civilian attire. Grants advantage on social deception checks.

title: Command Plate
description: Heavy plate bearing Command Zone insignia. Heavy armor. While Command Zone is active, bearer is immune to Taunt and Silence.

title: Ashfoot Salvage Armor
description: Mismatched enhancement-component armor with irregular coverage. Medium armor. Bearer can repair it from Ashlands Salvage Components.

title: Configuration Suit
description: A suit of modular armor that adjusts with Chrome Shaper configuration switches. Medium armor. Provides different Guard bonuses per active configuration.

title: Vein Plate
description: Armor with resonant-biological enhancement integration. Medium armor. When bearer pays HP costs, armor provides Guard 2 until end of next turn.

title: Wireweave Mesh Suit
description: A full body wire-silk suit integrated with the Wireweave's network node. Light armor. Grants advantage on Wire Craft network interactions while worn.

title: Hunter Coat
description: A long coat worn by Oni Hunters. Light armor. Provides advantage on tracking and pursuit actions. Reduces dissolution resonance contamination accumulation.

title: Void Robe
description: A robe that absorbs incoming resonance energy. Light armor. Empty Path: scales Guard with HP Percent inverse. Shell Path: provides flat Guard 4.

title: Masterless Coat
description: A long coat bearing no allegiance marks. Light armor. Provides advantage on all social checks in territory where bearer has no active allegiance.

title: Bone Lace
description: Resonant filament woven through the skeletal structure. Grants +4 Max HP and immunity to the Stagger status effect.

title: Echo Array
description: Multi-node resonant antenna array distributed across the skull. Grants advantage on all Echomind-related checks and doubles Iron Afterlife perception range.

title: Wire Spine
description: Full spinal wire-silk replacement. Grants +2 SIGNAL and enables simultaneous connection to two Wire Craft network nodes.

title: Resonant Heart
description: A resonant-biological hybrid cardiac replacement. Grants +6 Max HP and provides passive Regen 1 at start of each turn.

title: Void Lens
description: Single eye replacement with void-material optics. Grants vision into Between-space and reveals incorporeal entities within 30 feet.

title: Signal Cortex
description: Neural enhancement amplifying signal processing. Grants +2 SIGNAL. Wire Craft-dependent cards cost 1 less AP.

title: Iron Muscle Grafts
description: Full-body structural muscle reinforcement with resonant-iron weave. Grants +2 FRAME and advantage on all strength-based physical checks.

title: Dissolution Tracker
description: Subcutaneous sensor network detecting dissolution resonance. Grants advantage on detecting and tracking shell-state entities within 60 feet.

title: Grief Channel
description: A resonant duct running from spine to hands. Allows Echo Speaker to physically channel grief-stacks into attacks, converting stacks directly to bonus damage.

title: Fracture Node
description: A resonant node in the sternum generating fracture energy. Generates 1 Phantom Charge at start of each turn automatically.

title: Cascade Skin
description: Subcutaneous reactive plating converting impact force to cascade energy. Generates 2 Cascade on taking damage above a threshold (3+).

title: Binding Hands
description: Hand augmentation with integrated thread-dispensers for Puppet Binder binding procedures. Apply binds at half AP cost.

title: Debt Etching
description: Skin etching of Debt notation marks. Voice of Debt Debt-applying cards affect one additional target per use at no extra cost.

title: Intelligence Nodes
description: Distributed sensor nodes providing multi-point environmental analysis. Shadow Daimyo and Merchant Knife: grants one free intelligence stack per encounter.

title: Command Emitter
description: Throat-mounted resonant emitter projecting Command Zone frequency. Iron Herald: Command Zone radius increases by 10 feet and requires no card to establish.

title: Loaded Reservoir
description: Subcutaneous reservoir storing absorbed curse material. Curse Eater maximum Loaded Count increased by 5. Loaded Count never drops below 2.

title: Phase Socket
description: Spinal socket tuned to Between-space frequency. Void Walker: Incorporeal State entry and exit costs 0 AP. Phantom Charges generate passively.

title: Bio-Weave
description: Living biological material woven through the skin. Flesh Shaper: HP Tier thresholds shift upward by 10%. Regenerates bearer's HP by 1 each turn.

title: Hollow Core
description: A resonant void at the body's center. The Hollow: HP Percent scaling cards deal +25% damage. Bearer can sense nearby void concentrations.

title: Resonant Arm (Full Replacement)
description: Full arm replacement with resonant-metal construction. Grants +2 IRON and enables weapon-integration for class-specific arm weapons.

title: Signal Eye
description: Eye replacement with full signal-spectrum vision. Grants detection of all active Wire Craft connections within 40 feet and reads signal frequencies.

title: Heat Sink Array
description: Distributed thermal management system across the back. Reduces Overheat stack accumulation by 1 per turn automatically.

title: Pain Suppressor Node
description: Neurological enhancement blocking pain signal transmission. Grants immunity to Vulnerable status. Enhancement stress checks have advantage.

title: Target Designator
description: Optical targeting integration providing combat analysis. Mark status applied by bearer lasts 1 additional turn. Ranged attacks against Marked targets have advantage.

title: Wire Hands
description: Hand replacement with integrated wire-silk dispensers. Wireweave: network interaction range extended to 60 feet. Can establish connections as free action once per turn.

title: Between Eye
description: An eye attuned to Between-space frequency. Bearer sees entities and objects existing partially in Between. Reveals hidden phase-walkers.

title: Bone Hollow
description: Resonant hollowing of the major bones. Grants +4 Max HP and enables bearer to absorb one point of incoming damage per turn automatically.

title: Signal Lungs
description: Resonant replacement lung tissue with signal-harmonic capability. Voice of Debt and Iron Herald: voice-based cards affect targets up to 60 feet.

title: Resonance Scanner
description: Handheld device reading and categorizing resonant frequencies in a 40-foot radius. Identifies enhancement types, Claimant signatures, and Afterlife proximity.

title: Wire Diagnostic Kit
description: Precision tools for diagnosing Wire Craft network faults and enhancement system failures. Grants advantage on all Wire Craft repair and analysis checks.

title: Enhancement Removal Kit
description: Surgical toolkit for safe enhancement removal procedures. Required for voluntary enhancement removal without injury.

title: Caste Verification Device
description: Handheld device reading Ironhold caste registration marks. Grants advantage on identifying caste status and forged caste documentation.

title: Signal Frequency Analyzer
description: Device measuring and recording signal frequency signatures. Identifies individual Wire Craft users and enhancement system types.

title: Forge Calibration Set
description: Precision tools for calibrating resonant-metal enhancement systems. Required for Tier 2 and above enhancement installation.

title: Echomind Reader Probe
description: Sutensai-grade device for conducting controlled Echomind readings without augmentation. Requires Iron Sutra training to use safely.

title: Afterlife Contact Array
description: Multi-node resonant array for establishing reliable Iron Afterlife communication. Echoed and Echo Speaker primary tool; stabilizes contact attempts.

title: Void Measurement Device
description: Instrument measuring void energy density and Between-space proximity. Fracture Knight and Void Walker navigation utility.

title: Contamination Scrubber
description: Device removing Engine Scar contamination from equipment and biological material. Each use clears one contamination tier from target object.

title: Binding Thread Analyzer
description: Device reading and analyzing active binding thread connections. Puppet Binder utility; reveals all active binding relationships within 30 feet.

title: Debt Ledger
description: A formal accounting device tracking outstanding Debt obligations. Voice of Debt utility; provides mechanical advantage when detonating debt against recorded targets.

title: Intelligence Compiler
description: Device organizing and cross-referencing intelligence data. Shadow Daimyo and Merchant Knife utility; compiling intelligence on a target grants 1 bonus stack.

title: Cascade Meter
description: Resonant instrument measuring cascade energy levels in the environment. Shell Dancer utility; provides early warning of high-cascade events.

title: Fracture Energy Collector
description: A device harvesting ambient fracture resonance. Fracture Knight utility; provides 1 Phantom Charge per long rest from ambient collection.

title: Grief Stone Resonator
description: An amplification device for grief-resonance. Echo Speaker utility; doubles the range of grief-resonance effects during Iron Afterlife contact.

title: Wire Market Broker Kit
description: Tools and documentation for conducting Wire Market transactions. Merchant Knife utility; all trade-based social checks have advantage when kit is visible.

title: Iron Sutra Ritual Kit
description: Complete tools for conducting Iron Sutra rituals. Sutensai class requirement for advanced ritual procedures.

title: Puppet Control Remote
description: A remote device for managing Puppet Binder vessel commands at range. Commands to bound vessels can be issued from up to 60 feet.

title: Blood-Enhancement Monitor
description: Device monitoring Blood Smith biological-enhancement integration. Provides early warning before Enhancement Status shifts to Failing.

title: Bio Scanner
description: Device analyzing biological material quality for Flesh Shaper procedures. Identifies optimal Bio-Reinforcement Compound sources.

title: Path Detector
description: A resonant instrument measuring Empty versus Shell path resonance density. The Hollow utility; confirms path integrity and identifies resonance contamination.

title: Command Zone Marker Set
description: A set of four resonant stakes used to physically mark Iron Herald Command Zone boundaries. Zone is harder to disrupt when physically marked.

title: Resonant Charge Cell
description: Disposable resonant energy cell providing a burst of signal energy. Grants one additional Resonant Card use per encounter. Single use.

title: Fracture Catalyst
description: A chemical catalyst triggering rapid fracture resonance generation. Grants 3 Phantom Charges immediately. Enhancement stress check required.

title: Grief Distillate
description: Highly concentrated grief-resonance in liquid form. Grants 3 grief stacks immediately for Echo Speaker. Causes Vulnerable 1 as a side effect.

title: Void Catalyst
description: A catalyst accelerating void resonance concentration. Grants 2 Anchor Points for Void Walker. Single use.

title: Cascade Primer
description: Applied to armor before combat. Grants 4 Cascade at encounter start for Shell Dancer. Single use.

title: Debt Ink
description: Ritual ink used in Voice of Debt procedures. Applying to a target before combat places 1 pre-existing Debt stack. Single use.

title: Binding Resin
description: Resin that hardens into binding-thread material. Puppet Binder emergency supply; provides binding thread for one procedure without requiring a spool.

title: Loaded Catalyst
description: Concentrated curse material. Adds 2 Loaded Count to Curse Eater immediately. Single use; slight corruption accumulation.

title: Bio-Growth Compound
description: Accelerated biological growth compound for Flesh Shaper. Restores bearer to the next HP Tier up regardless of current HP.

title: HP Percent Elixir
description: Elixir that temporarily inflates HP Percent reading. The Hollow: all HP Percent-scaling cards use maximum (100%) value for one encounter.

title: Intelligence Compound
description: Chemical compound enhancing information retention and pattern recognition. Shadow Daimyo and Merchant Knife: next intelligence-gathering action provides 2 stacks.

title: Signal Amplifier Vial
description: Temporary signal frequency amplification compound. All signal-based cards deal +3 damage and apply +1 to status stacks for one encounter.

title: Resonant Meal
description: A meal prepared with resonant-treated ingredients. Provides standard nutrition and grants Regen 2 for the first two turns of next encounter.

title: Between Stabilizer
description: Compound stabilizing Between-space exposure effects. Prevents Between bleed-through for one full day. Required for extended phase-walk operations.

title: Afterlife Anchor Compound
description: Prevents Echomind drift and Afterlife entity attachment for 48 hours. Required for extended Ashlands and Veilward operations by Echoed characters.

title: Pain Inhibitor
description: Short-term neurological compound blocking pain and Vulnerable status. Lasts one encounter. Enhancement stress check at encounter end.

title: Resonance Cleanse
description: Ritual compound clearing accumulated resonant contamination. Removes all active negative resonance effects and resets contamination status.

title: Field Surgery Kit
description: Emergency surgical supplies for field trauma treatment. Restores 8 HP and removes Bleed. Requires 1 minute outside combat to apply.

title: Armor Patch
description: Quick-bonding resonant compound for in-combat armor repair. Restores Guard 3 immediately. Single use; takes free action to apply.

title: Enhancement Coolant
description: Thermal management compound reducing Overheat accumulation. Removes all current Overheat stacks immediately. Single use.

title: Resonant Ration Bar
description: Compressed resonant-treated nutrition block for field operations. Provides sustenance and grants +1 HP at start of next encounter.

title: Void Null
description: Compound suppressing void resonance activity. Prevents Fracture stacks and Phantom Charge generation for one encounter. Primarily for counter-use against enemies.

title: Wire Craft Jammer
description: Compact device that jams all Wire Craft signals in a 20-foot radius for 3 turns. Affects all targets including allies.

title: Truth Serum
description: A chemical compound inhibiting deceptive speech. Target cannot intentionally lie for 10 minutes. Used in interrogation and negotiation.

title: Memory Compound
description: Compound enhancing Echomind memory recall. Allows access to any memory clearly experienced within the last month with perfect clarity.

title: Caste Masking Agent
description: Chemical compound masking enhancement signatures to appear as a different caste tier. Lasts 4 hours; defeats standard caste verification.

title: Resonant Charge
description: Thrown explosive charge. Deals 6 + SIGNAL damage to all targets within 10 feet. Applies Stagger 1. Single use.

title: Signal Flare
description: Resonant flare visible to both physical sight and Wire Craft scanning within 200 feet. Used for signaling, distraction, or area denial.

title: Field Resonance Kit
description: Compact kit for emergency resonant repair and calibration. Restores one enhancement to Stable status. Requires 5 minutes to apply.

title: Forged Registration Papers
description: Official documentation registering a Forged unit with Ironhold administration. Required for legal status in Ironhold territory.

title: Class License
description: Official documentation certifying a character's class affiliation and legal standing. Required for certain high-security operations.

title: Sutensai Ordinance Writ
description: A formal writ issued by a Sutensai authorizing a specific action within Ironhold territory. Provides legal cover for one potentially illegal operation.

title: Wire Market Charter
description: Documentation establishing a Wire Market business operation. Provides cover for Wire Craft operations and trade activities in the Pale Reach.

title: Korrath Military Dispatch
description: A sealed military communication bearing Korrath's seal. Either a genuine order or a forgery. Provides command authority over Ironhold soldiers.

title: Vaen's Testimony
description: A recorded testimony from Vaen of the Empty Hand. Carries legal and spiritual weight in all territories. Can compel compliance from Vaen-aligned individuals.

title: Author Network Map
description: Partial map of the Hollow Author's puppet network in one territory. Provides intelligence on Author-controlled locations and personnel.

title: Seventh Convergence Prophecy
description: A fragment of prophetic text regarding the Seventh Convergence. Provides context for current campaign events. Value as historical artifact.

title: Echomind Research Notes
description: Academic notes on Echomind resonance patterns from before the Ascension War. Provides technical understanding of Echomind mechanics.

title: Ascension War Record
description: A military history of the Ascension War period. Provides context for Claimant motivations and historical allegiances.

title: Enhancement Registry
description: A registry of all legally installed enhancements for one individual. Required for certain Sutensai procedures and caste verification.

title: Iron Sutra Fragment
description: A fragment of Iron Sutra scripture. Provides spiritual authority in encounters with Iron Sutra adherents. Required for certain ritual procedures.

title: Wire Market Price List
description: Current pricing and availability for Wire Market goods and services. Provides advantage on all Wire Market transactions.

title: Dissolution Research
description: Academic research on dissolution resonance and shell-state mechanics. Oni Hunter utility; grants advantage on identifying dissolution-touched targets.

title: Claimant Network Chart
description: A hand-drawn chart mapping known relationships between all three Claimants and their supporters. High intelligence value.

title: Forged Technical Manual
description: Technical documentation for Forged chassis maintenance and modification. Grants advantage on all Forged-related maintenance checks.

title: Wanted Notice
description: A formal notice identifying a target. Carrying this about a target provides social leverage with law enforcement. Can be forged.

title: Safe House Key
description: A marked resonant key providing access to a faction-controlled safe house. Location varies by faction; provides shelter and basic supplies.

title: Patrol Schedule
description: Intercepted or purchased patrol schedule for a specific installation. Grants advantage on stealth checks within that location for one session.

title: Resonant Deed
description: Formal ownership documentation for a location or significant asset. Legal weight varies by territory.

title: Black Market Contact
description: A name and signal frequency for a black market supplier. Provides access to one category of restricted goods without documentation.

title: Signal Dampener
description: A worn device suppressing the bearer's signal signature. Makes the bearer effectively invisible to passive Wire Craft scanning.

title: Resonant Compass
description: Standard navigation tool tuned to local resonant north. Provides reliable navigation in resonant-disrupted environments.

title: Wire Craft Relay
description: A portable relay extending Wire Craft network range by 200 feet. Required for operations in low-coverage zones.

title: Resonant Rope
description: Wire-silk rope with resonant reinforcement. Supports up to 2000 pounds. Can be cut only by resonant-edged weapons.

title: Resonant Climbing Harness
description: Wire-silk harness for vertical movement. Provides advantage on all climbing checks. Integrates with Wire Craft-assisted movement cards.

title: Field Medic Bag
description: Comprehensive medical supplies for field treatment. Provides three uses of Remove Bleed or Stabilize. Requires medical training or Forge Tender class.

title: Resonant Lantern
description: A lantern using resonant material for illumination. Provides 40-foot radius of light. Cannot be extinguished by non-resonant means.

title: Signal Recorder
description: Device recording Wire Craft signals for later playback or analysis. Stores up to 10 minutes of signal activity.

title: Resonant Lockpick Set
description: Lockpicking tools compatible with resonant-lock systems. Provides advantage on bypass checks for resonant-secured doors and containers.

title: Advanced Between Compass
description: High-precision Between-space navigation instrument. Provides exact distance to nearest Between-space entry point and current phase-field density.

title: Wire-Silk Tent
description: Portable shelter of wire-silk material. Provides weather and minor resonance protection for up to four occupants. Packs into 1x1 inventory space.

title: Resonant Cookset
description: Cookware for preparing resonant-treated meals. Meals prepared provide Regen 1 for first turn of next encounter.

title: Caste Marker Set
description: A set of portable caste identification markers for establishing temporary social cover. Grants advantage on caste-impersonation checks.

title: Between-Space Anchor Stake
description: A resonant stake driven into the ground to anchor physical reality against Between-space drift. Required in high-phase-density zones.

title: Resonant Writing Set
description: Writing tools using resonant-infused ink. Text written is readable to enhanced individuals even in darkness. Unreadable to non-enhanced.

title: Signal Disruptor Bracelet
description: Wrist-worn device disrupting signal tracking on the bearer. Provides advantage on checks to avoid signal-based tracking.

title: Tactical Map Case
description: Hardened case for protecting tactical documents. Contents cannot be read by Wire Craft scanning. Provides quick access to stored maps in combat.

title: Resonant Water Purifier
description: Device purifying water sources of resonant contamination. Required for safe hydration in contaminated zones.

title: Signal Mirror
description: A mirror coated with resonant material for long-range signaling. Can send simple coded messages via signal reflection to Wire Craft-equipped recipients.

title: Resonant Ink Tattoo
description: Permanent resonant-ink body marking visible only to enhanced vision. Used for identification, faction marking, and as a navigation marker.

title: Enhancement Disguise Kit
description: Tools for modifying enhancement appearance to resemble a different type or caste level. Lasts 12 hours per application.

title: Between-Space Filter
description: Wearable filter reducing Between-space resonance exposure. Extends safe phase-walk duration by 50%. Required for Between-adjacent territory operations.

title: Debt Collection Badge
description: A formal badge issued by Wire Market debt collection services. Provides legal authority to demand payment from registered debtors.

title: Ironhold Ration Supplement
description: Standard supplement pack added to basic Ironhold rations. Extends ration pack longevity by one additional rest cycle.

title: Wire Market Shopping List
description: A compiled list of available goods and their current Wire Market prices. Provides advantage on finding specific items within Wire Market territory.

title: Resonant Shelter Capsule
description: A single-use compressed shelter deploying in 30 seconds. Provides shelter for one person in hostile environments.

title: Void-Sight Goggles
description: Wearable optical device providing limited void-spectrum vision. Reveals objects partially phased into Between-space.

title: Corpse Tag
description: Resonant tag applied to remains for Afterlife contact facilitation. Increases probability of successful Iron Afterlife communication by 50%.

title: Faction Insignia Set
description: Complete set of visual markers for three major factions. Wearing the appropriate insignia grants initial social acceptance within that faction's territory.

title: Resonant Saddle Bag
description: Wire-silk saddle bag with resonant reinforcement. Doubles carry capacity for small items. Contents protected from resonant scanning.

title: Vein Crystal
description: A resonant crystal containing encoded Vein Oath resonance. Ironclad Samurai: allows one additional Vein Oath discipline selection per rest.

title: Reading Stone
description: A smooth resonant stone used in Sutensai reading practice. Reduces Echomind reading difficulty by one tier. Amplifies reader authority.

title: Dissolution Sample
description: A contained sample of dissolution resonance. Oni Hunter utility; provides advantage on identifying and tracking dissolution entities.

title: Contract Seal
description: A resonant seal that binds a contract with resonant force. Ronin utility; both parties to a resonant-sealed contract are aware if terms are violated.

title: Attunement Crystal
description: A crystal pre-attuned to Forge Tender resonance frequency. Allows repair of one additional target per short rest beyond normal limits.

title: Node Crystal
description: A crystallized Wire Craft node providing portable network access. Wireweave can draw on this crystal for one network interaction when outside standard range.

title: Signal Capacitor
description: A resonant capacitor storing signal discharge energy. Pulse Caller: restores 2 AP to Pulse Arm-related cards once per encounter.

title: Grief Collector
description: A hollow resonant sphere collecting ambient grief-resonance. After one long rest in a grief-dense location, provides 2 grief stacks at encounter start.

title: Phantom Shard
description: A crystallized phantom-space fragment. Generates 1 Phantom Charge at the start of each encounter regardless of rest state.

title: Cascade Bead
description: A resonant bead tuned to impact frequency. Worn in combat; generates 1 Cascade when the bearer takes 5+ damage in a single hit.

title: Shadow Crystal
description: A crystal containing Shadow Daimyo-attuned resonance. Allows intelligence gathered on a target to persist through one long rest without degrading.

title: Blood Stone
description: A stone soaked in resonant-biological material. Blood Smith: reduces HP cost of all HP-cost cards by 1 (minimum 1) while carried.

title: Void Sphere
description: A sphere of crystallized void energy. The Hollow: bearer can read their exact HP Percent at all times without calculation.

title: Ledger Crystal
description: A crystal that records and stores trade transactions. Merchant Knife: intelligence gathered from trade-based actions is stored in crystal and persists between sessions.

title: Command Crystal
description: A resonant crystal amplifying command-frequency projections. Iron Herald: Command Zone card costs 0 AP when this crystal is equipped.

title: Curse Fragment
description: A fragment of crystallized curse resonance. Curse Eater: provides 1 free Loaded Count at start of each encounter.

title: Thread Crystal
description: A crystal pre-loaded with binding thread resonance. Puppet Binder: one bind per encounter costs 0 AP when crystal is equipped.

title: Unnamed Fragment (Personal)
description: A resonant fragment attuned to a specific unnamed individual. Amplifies The Unnamed's Active Stat bonuses by 1 while carried.

title: Salvage Core
description: A dense resonant core salvaged from a high-tier enhancement. Ashfoot: counts as three Ashlands Salvage Components for modification procedures.

title: Configuration Crystal
description: A crystal storing one Chrome Shaper configuration's complete stat profile. Switching to this config costs 0 AP once per encounter.

title: Wire Crystal
description: A crystal storing an active Wire Craft signal frequency. Veilblade: grants advantage on one wire-integration check per encounter.

title: Vitality Stone
description: A stone storing biological resonance energy. Flesh Shaper: activating this stone immediately restores HP Tier to the next level up.

title: Sutensai Blessing Token
description: A token granted by a Sutensai as acknowledgment of a service or debt. Worth significant social capital in Ironhold territory.

title: Ironhold Military Voucher
description: A voucher redeemable for military supplies and services within Ironhold installations. Face value 30 trade-metal equivalent.

title: Wire Market Bond
description: A formal Wire Market financial instrument. Redeemable at any Wire Market exchange for face value. Current rate: 100 trade-metal.

title: Claimant Favor Token
description: A token representing a favor owed by one of the three Claimants. Extremely high value; can be redeemed for significant resources or information.

title: Ashlands High Scrip
description: High-value exchange medium used among Ashlands survivors and the Char collective. Worth 50 trade-metal among those who accept it.

title: Black Market Voucher
description: An untraceable credit voucher valid at specific black market locations. Face value 40 trade-metal; cannot be converted to standard currency.

title: The Seven Names
description: A resonant metal plaque bearing seven names of the honored dead from the Ascension War. Bearer gains combat insight from each name once per named encounter.

title: The Before-Voice
description: A sealed resonant capsule containing a preserved voice recording from before the Convergence. Playing it once provides absolute truth about one past event.

title: The First Contract
description: The original contract binding the first Ironclad Samurai to service. Reading it grants one level of Vein Oath discipline mastery. Single use.

title: The Third Eye
description: A resonant lens extracted from a Prior Ascended at the moment of Ascension. Allows bearer to perceive the Convergence directly. Blinding to non-enhanced.

title: The Empty Throne
description: A small replica of the throne room where the first Convergence occurred. Grants authority over Afterlife entities when placed. Heavy.

title: The Long Count
description: A resonant register recording every death in Tesshari since the Ascension War. Bearer can look up any death that occurred in their lifetime.

title: Dissolution Core
description: The preserved core of a fully dissolved entity. Grants immunity to dissolution resonance and provides +4 to all SIGNAL cards for one encounter per day.

title: The Forgotten Name
description: A resonant fragment containing an identity that was deliberately erased. Bearer temporarily adopts the erased identity, bypassing all recognition checks for one hour.

title: Korrath's Battle Standard
description: A military standard carried by Korrath during the Ascension War. Grants command authority over all Korrath-aligned forces. Extremely dangerous to possess.

title: Vaen's Empty Mirror
description: A mirror Vaen used to study their own dissolution. Reflects the viewer's enhancement network in full detail. Used in Sutensai diagnostic procedures.

title: The Hollow Author's Manuscript
description: Pages of the Author's original puppet-binding research. Provides complete understanding of Author network architecture in one territory.

title: Ascension War Service Medal
description: A service medal from the Ascension War era. Grants recognition and deference from Ascension War veterans. Significant historical value.

title: Iron Sutra Original Page
description: An original page from the Iron Sutra scripture written during the Convergence. Grants absolute authority in Iron Sutra contexts.

title: Wire Market's First Ledger
description: The original Wire Market trading ledger from its founding. Contains every founding transaction. Grants historical authority in Wire Market negotiations.

title: Resonant Chest
description: A lockable chest lined with resonant material. Contents cannot be scanned or detected by Wire Craft or Echomind perception. Holds 20 inventory units.

title: Wire Safe
description: A secure container integrated with Wire Craft locking. Can only be opened by a registered Wire Craft signal key. Holds 10 inventory units.

title: Between-Space Pocket
description: A small pouch that extends into Between-space. Holds up to 5 items of any size. Items cannot be detected while stored.

title: Enhancement Transport Case
description: A hardened case for safely transporting uninstalled enhancement modules. Prevents damage and resonant discharge during transport. Holds 4 augmentation items.

title: Ashground Ferment
description: A potent distillate brewed in the Ashground Reaches. Clears one negative status effect when consumed.

title: Ironwork Stimulant
description: A combat stimulant manufactured in the Ironwork Reaches. Temporarily boosts Iron Tolerance for one scene.

title: Void Breath Capsule
description: A pressurized capsule containing stabilized void resonance. Grants brief incorporeal resistance when inhaled.

title: Signal Blocker Dose
description: A pharmaceutical that suppresses resonance signature for one full scene. Single use.

title: Grief Salve
description: Applied before activating an Echo Speaker HP-cost ability. Reduces next HP cost by 1.

title: Cascade Dampener Dose
description: When consumed, immediately reduces Shell Dancer Cascade Stacks by 3 (minimum 0).

title: Between Tincture
description: A distillation of Between-state resonance. Iron Monk: immediately triggers Between state without card play.

title: Quarry Scent Marker
description: Applied covertly to a target. Oni Hunter treats them as Marked for one scene without spending a mark card.

title: Resonant Bandage
description: Recovers 2 HP when applied. Resonant material threading accelerates surface wound closure.

title: Echo Anchor Tablet
description: Stabilizes an Echo Speaker's grief resonance. Prevents grief stack gain for one full scene.

title: Wire Splice (Single Use)
description: Pre-loaded wire repair capsule. Wireweave: restores one wire attachment without spending an action.

title: Forge Flux Charge
